title: Pan-Seared Squid with Umami Flaky Sauce
description: A flavorful and tender squid dish from Argentina, elevated by a rich and savory flaky sauce.
instructions: 1. Rinse the squid under cold water and pat it dry with paper towels.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Add the squid and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until cooked through.
5. Remove the squid from the skillet and set it aside.
6. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
7. Add the flaky and umami, and stir to combine.
8. Cook for 1-2 minutes until the sauce is heated through.
9. Stir in the lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Serve the squid with the flaky sauce spooned over the top.
